documents.title: Patient Operations SOP
documents.summary: New patient intake is inconsistent. OpsPilot structured it into a sop with owners, training tasks, knowledge base answers, and gap findings.

steps.title: Collect required documents
steps.detail: Staff ask for insurance card, consent forms, medication list, and preferred pharmacy, but order changes by person.

steps.title: Confirm appointment reminders
steps.detail: Need a script for confirming appointment reminders.

steps.title: Escalate billing questions
steps.detail: Escalate billing questions to office manager.

steps.title: Verify compliance acknowledgement
steps.detail: Confirm HIPAA acknowledgement before collecting clinical history.

steps.title: Collect required documents
steps.detail: If forms are missing, send secure portal link and call the patient 24 hours before visit.

checklist.task: Review the sop for Brightline Dental and explain the success criteria
Shadow one complete Patient Operations workflow and record the handoff points
Demonstrate standardize intake requirements without manager prompts
Demonstrate collect required documents without manager prompts
Demonstrate confirm appointment reminders without manager prompts
Demonstrate escalate billing questions without manager prompts

articles.question: What does Front Desk Coordinator need before starting the Patient Operations workflow?
articles.answer: Start with New patient intake is inconsistent. Confirm required inputs and the expected output before the workflow moves forward.

articles.question: Who owns exceptions in Patient Operations?
articles.answer: Exceptions should be routed to Operations Manager with context, urgency, customer impact, and the next required action.

articles.question: How does Brightline Dental confirm completion?
articles.answer: Brightline Dental should confirm completion by checking every required step, recording the owner, and saving final status in the team system of record.

gaps.title: Review cadence missing
gaps.evidence: Compliance-sensitive notes need a revision cadence and reviewer.
gaps.fix: Schedule quarterly review and name the approving manager.

versions.label: v2.0
versions.author: OpsPilot
changes: Rebuilt training and knowledge base outputs

documents.body:
Purpose
Convert Patient Operations knowledge into a repeatable sop for Brightline Dental so staff can complete work consistently, record ownership, and escalate exceptions without relying on informal memory.

Trigger
Use this procedure when a sop touches compliance-sensitive records, approvals, consent, billing, or customer data.

Owner
Primary owner: Front Desk Coordinator. Backup reviewer: Operations Manager. The owner keeps the procedure current, verifies training completion, and confirms open gaps are reviewed before publishing.

Steps
1. Standardize intake requirements: New patient intake is inconsistent. Owner: Front Desk Coordinator. Timing: Start of workflow.
2. Collect required documents: Staff ask for insurance card, consent forms, medication list, and preferred pharmacy, but order changes by person. Owner: Front Desk Coordinator. Timing: During active handling.
3. Confirm appointment reminders: Need a script for confirming appointment reminders. Owner: Front Desk Coordinator. Timing: During active handling.
4. Escalate billing questions: Escalate billing questions to office manager. Owner: Operations Manager. Timing: During active handling.
5. Verify compliance acknowledgement: Confirm HIPAA acknowledgement before collecting clinical history. Owner: Front Desk Coordinator. Timing: During active handling.
6. Collect required documents: If forms are missing, send secure portal link and call the patient 24 hours before visit. Owner: Front Desk Coordinator. Timing: Before completion is approved.

Quality checks
- Required inputs are collected before work is marked complete.
- The accountable owner is recorded in the system of record.
- Exceptions include context, urgency, customer impact, and next action.
- Completion notes are clear enough for a manager to audit later.

Escalation path
Escalate blocked, urgent, compliance-sensitive, billing, safety, or customer-impacting exceptions to the Operations Manager the same business day. Include the document title, affected customer or work item, current owner, and requested decision.

Review cadence
Review this document quarterly and after any policy, billing, compliance, or customer-impacting workflow change.

Audit/version note
Save a new version after each material edit, publish only after open high-risk gaps are reviewed, and track this gap focus before handoff: Schedule quarterly review and name the approving manager..

auditEvents.summary: Marked gap fixed: Patient Operations SOP.
